name: How to Shuck Fresh Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and rinse the oysters well in cool water.
2. Place the oysters on a counter, flat side up.
3. Knock off the thin edge (bill) with a hammer.
4. Insert an oyster knife into the broken edge.
5. Slip the knife around to the back of the oyster.
6. Sever the hinge as close to the flat upper shell as possible.
7. Lift off the top shell and discard it.
8. Cut any muscle from the lower shell.
9. Carefully feel the oyster for bits of shell or grit, paying particular attention to the hinge.
10. If the oysters are to be served or cooked on the half shell, replace them in their deep shells.
Note: Open oysters over a small bowl to catch any spilled juice and strain the juice through a double thickness of cheesecloth before using.
